To align behavior, we must avoid reducing over empty dimensions — fix by changing axis/dim to 1 (non-empty dimension) or use torch.amin (which supports empty dims in newer PyTorch versions), but torch.amin is not equivalent to torch.min for all cases. Best repair: use dim=1 which exists and is non-empty.
